name: signalQuality
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). COMPONENT-EXACT shape: panel sends {artifact:{data:{snrDb,bitErrorRate,latencyMs,jitterMs}}}; dispatch peels the wrapper. RETURNS snr/bitErrorRate/latencyMs/jitterMs/mosScore/voiceQuality/videoCapable. mos = clamp(1,5, 4.5 - latency/100 - jitter/20 - (ber>1e-4?2:0)); voiceQuality keyed off the UNROUNDED mos (>=4 excellent / >=3.5 good / >=3 fair / else poor) while mosScore is round(mos*10)/10 — the panel renders both, so the boundary case mos=3.95 → mosScore 4.0 but voiceQuality 'good'. videoCapable = latency<100 && jitter<30. POISON: every numeric via num() → finite defaults; mosScore stays in [1,5]. Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/telecommunications-lens-macros.test.js.
